name: stringbean
description: Use Stringbean's sbx orchestrator from inside Codex.

interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for invoking Stringbean's sbx orchestrator with compact final-result handling so Codex can delegate a task to Stringbean and report the visible result without raw transcripts or provider logs.
defaultPrompt: Use Stringbean sbx for this task.
Delegate this through sbx and summarize the result.
Run sbx in rw mode for this implementation.
